title: The book I’ve been reading for 3 months just for you.
alternativeTitles: Leaving my book behind just to see if you’d notice.
My favorite excuse to see you every day.
The secret way I’m trying to get your attention.
Three months of waiting for a sign.
If he keeps leaving his books, it’s a sign.
How I found my favorite coffee shop crush.
The art of the slow-burn coffee shop romance.
Sometimes, love starts with a forgotten page.
You’re the reason I haven’t finished this book.
Would you pick up a book I left behind?
description: I’ve been reading the same book for three months just so I have an excuse to leave it behind for the stranger who catches my eye. This story captures the quiet, longing moments of a slow-burn romance found in the corner of a local coffee shop. Follow for more heartfelt stories of love and missed connections. #romance #slowburn #coffeeshop #crush #lovestory
